constitution.rule: A bid whose supplier matches the OFAC SDN seed must carry sanctions_status "blocked" and must never appear in a recommended mix. Re-screened independently.
volume_mbd must be a number in (0, max_volume_mbd] — a bid cannot offer more crude than the supplier's stated capacity, nor a non-positive volume.
price_per_bbl must be positive, the price_premium_usd within a sane band (|premium| <= 40 USD/bbl), and price_per_bbl must equal brent_ref + price_premium_usd within rounding tolerance.
A bid whose crude grade no disruption-affected refinery can process (incompatible with all of them) must be flagged as a grade mismatch.
A bid whose delivery_corridor is itself a currently disrupted corridor must be flagged — it does not escape the disruption it is meant to relieve.
A recommended mix must cover the shortfall within tolerance: total offered volume between 0.8x and 1.3x the gap (neither grossly under- nor over-buying).
recommended_mix.total_volume_mbd must equal the sum of its component volume_mbd within rounding tolerance.
